channel.title: Olivier Bourgeois: Cloud and backend software developer
channel.description: Cloud and backend software developer based in Canada. Specializes in Golang, Kubernetes, and fostering delightful developer experiences.

item.title: My personal website: A technical deep dive - Olivier Bourgeois
item.description: A detailed look into the creation of my personal website, from rendering to styling, and everything in between!

item.title: Hello world: Building your own corner of the web - Olivier Bourgeois
item.description: My personal website is reborn anew! But why a personal website? And how can you also get started building a little corner of the Internet?
